content: State-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agent memory systems can be rearchitected to treat each individual agent within a multi-agent ecosystem as a specialized, distributed 'external memory entry' for a root active learning agent, rather than framing agent design as separate from memory architecture. This turns the multi-agent collective into a dynamically expanding, queryable active memory that updates via curiosity-driven exploration rather than static storage allocation.
